subcodes.first_line: O unique and peerless one! Thy letter was received. The arrival of the reply to the first was mentioned, but not the arrival of the second reply [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای وحید فرید نامه شما رسید وصول جواب اول مرقوم بود ولی وصول جواب ثانی غیر
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @Shrines and Holy places
